---
title: 'catalog show'
---

Show full metadata for a catalog entry: name, aliases, kind, backends, schemas,
parameters, builders, cache key, and more.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog show <name> [OPTIONS]
```

## Arguments

- **`name`** — Entry name **or** alias.

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--json` | off | Output the structured sidecar metadata as JSON. |
| `--raw` | off | Output the raw YAML sidecar file as written on disk. |

`--json` and `--raw` are mutually exclusive.

## Example output

```text
Name:           f02d28198715
Aliases:        penguins-prod, current
Type:           Source (bound)
Root tag:       penguins
Backends:       duckdb
Content local:  yes
Cache key:      ...

Params:
  threshold                float64 = 0.5

Schema Out:
  species                  string
  island                   string
  body_mass_g              float64
  health_score             float64
```

## See also

- [`catalog schema`](schema.qmd) — schema-only view
- [`catalog list`](list.qmd) — list entries
